tantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Moveable , Nameable public class ModelDirectory extends CompositeEntity A directory of open models. An instance of this class is contained by a Configuration. Each open model is represented by an inst

uration. Each open model is represented by an instance of Effigy. An effigy represents the model data. It contains a string attribute named "identifier" with a string value that uniquely identifies the model. A typical choice (which depend on th

s the model. A typical choice (which depend on the configuration) is the canonical URL for a MoML file that describes the model. An effigy also contains all open instances of Tableau associated with the model. Since: Ptolemy II 1.0 Version: $Id$
